resources.string: Yana yada wurin ku ga lambobinku da aka amince da su
Gargaɗin rashin bugun zuciya da geofence
Yana raba wurin ku da wasu
\"%1$s\" yana neman izinin shiga saitunansu. Kyale?
Sarrafa wuraren geofence da aka raba
Sanar da ni lokacin da ake bibiyata
Sami sanarwa lokacin da kusancin lamba ko gargaɗin geofence ya tashi a kanku.

Nuna adireshin tituna don tarihin wurare da pini na taswira, sannan a nemo ta adireshi lokacin sanya geofences. Yana aika waɗannan haɗin gwiwar ko bincikenku zuwa sabis na geocoding na na\'urarku (yawanci Google).
Saituna suna buƙatar amincewar mai sa ido
Ana buƙatar amincewar mai sa ido don shiga saituna
Daidaita sau nawa ake yada wurin ku
Sarrafa sau nawa ake sabunta wurin ku dangane da aikinku. Sabuntawa akai-akai yana amfani da ƙarin baturi.
Nuna kawai wuraren da suke aƙalla wannan nisan daga na baya.
Kada ku yada ko kurekodi sabuntawarku mai radius na inganci mafi girma fiye da wannan. Ba a taɓa tsallake SOS ba.
Ɓoye wuraren tarihi tare da radius na inganci mafi girma fiye da wannan. Babu abin da za a share.
Yana tace nau\'in motsin ku (tafiya, tuki) a tarihi
Ba da damar shiga ayyukan jiki don ingantaccen lakabin motsi
LocaPeer na iya yin aiki a bango kyauta
Danna don saita zuwa Ba shi da iyaka a saitunan tsarin
Dubawa da gyara damar app na shiga wuri, kamara da sauransu
LocaPeer tana buƙatar waɗannan izini don raba wurin ku, bincika gayyata da ci gaba da aiki a bango. Danna duk wanda ba a bayar ba don gyara su.
Za a iya raba wurin ku
Danna don ba da damar shiga wuri
Rabon wuri yana ci gaba lokacin da app ɗin yake a rufe
Danna don ba da damar shiga \'A kowane lokaci\' a saituna
Ana amfani da shi don duba lambobin QR na gayyata
Danna don ba da damar kamara
Ana iya nuna gargaɗi da sabunta matsayi
Danna don ba da damar sanarwa
Tsayon lokacin da za a riƙe bayanan wurin lambobi a cikin na\'urar
Tsayon lokacin da za a riƙe saƙonnin da aka karɓa a cikin na\'urar
Zaɓi kuma tsara alamun shafukan ƙasa
Ajiye maɓallin sirri da lambobinku a cikin fayil. Kiyaye wannan fayil ɗin!
Mayar daga fayil ɗin da aka fitar a baya
Nuna maɓallin asalin ku na hex mai haruffa 64
Sigar, matsayin relay, asalin buɗe ido
Wasu na iya duba wannan don fara bin wurin ku.
Kiyaye wannan cikin aminci. Duk wanda ke da wannan maɓallin na iya bayyana a matsayin ku.
Dukkan tarihin wuraren da aka ajiye za a share su gaba ɗaya.
Dukkan saƙonnin da aka ajiye za a share su gaba ɗaya.
Wannan hifadi yana da kalmar sirri. Da fatan za a shigar da kalmar sirri don ci gaba.
Zaɓi Bayanan Da Za A Mayar
Zaɓi Bayanan Da Za A Fitar
Zaku iya saita kalmar sirri don rufa fayil ɗin hifadi naku.
Zaɓi sassan da za a haɗa:
Zabi lamba wacce za ta zama mai sa ido. Dole ne su amince da shiga saituna daga na\'urarsu.
Ba a sami lamba ba. Da farko a ƙara lamba ta hanyar duba lambar QR ta gayyatarsu.
Saituna za su kasance masu sauƙin shiga ba tare da amincewar mai sa ido ba.
Lokaci Na Ƙarshe Da Aka Gani
Duba lambar QR don haɗawa da wani kuma fara raba wurare.
Lokaci na ƙarshe da aka gani: %1$s
Shin kuna cire %1$s daga lambobinku? Tarihinsa na wuri kuma za a share shi a cikin na\'urar.
Wannan zai cire ku daga lambobin %1$s kuma zai share dukkan saƙonku da bayanan wurinku daga na\'urarsa. Haka kuma ba za ku sake samun damar shiga wurinsa ba.
Wannan zai share dukkan saƙon da kuka aika daga na\'urar %1$s. Wannan ba za a iya soke shi ba.
Wannan zai share dukkan bayanan wurin da kuka raba daga na\'urar %1$s. Wannan ba za a iya soke shi ba.

plurals.name: contacts_bulk_remove_body
plurals.item: Cire wannan lamba? Tarihinsa na wuri kuma za a share shi a cikin na\'urar.
Cire lambobi %1$d? Tarihinsu na wuri kuma za a share su a cikin na\'urar.

plurals.name: contacts_bulk_delete_messages_body
plurals.item: Share dukkan saƙon da kuka aika daga na\'urar wannan lamba daga nesa? Wannan ba za a iya soke shi ba.
Share dukkan saƙon da kuka aika daga na\'urorin lambobi %1$d daga nesa? Wannan ba za a iya soke shi ba.

plurals.name: contacts_bulk_delete_locations_body
plurals.item: Share dukkan tarihin wurin da kuka raba daga na\'urar wannan lamba daga nesa? Wannan ba za a iya soke shi ba.
Share dukkan tarihin wurin da kuka raba daga na\'urorin lambobi %1$d daga nesa? Wannan ba za a iya soke shi ba.

resources.string: Manna maɓallin sirri na haruffa 64 hex don mayar da asalin ku da lambobinku.
Raba wurin zama na sirri tare da lambobi.\nBabu asusu. Babu manyan sabobin.
Wurin ku yana rufaffen a kan na\'ura
Yana amfani da relay Nostr masu buɗe ido a matsayin sufuri mai aminci - bayanan ku suna kasancewa a rufaffen kuma na sirri
Cikakken tarihin wurin ku yana zama a kan na\'urar ku. Matsayinku na yanzu kawai ake raba wa lambobi da aka zaɓa
Yaya ya kamata lambobinku su kira ku?
Maɓallin sirrin ku ana samar da shi ne a cikin na\'urar kuma ba ya barin wannan na\'urar.

LocaPeer tana buƙatar shiga wuri don raba matsayinku, shiga kamara don duba lambobin gayyata, da shiga sanarwa don matsayin bango. Shiga ayyukan jiki na zaɓi ne - yana taimakawa lakabin motsin ku (tafiya, tuki) mafi inganci.
Zaku ga wasu bukatu na tsarin kamar haka:
• Wuri - ana buƙata, don raba matsayinku.
• Ayyukan jiki - na zaɓi. Yana bawa LocaPeer damar bambance tafiya, tuki da tsayawa cak mafi inganci. Kuna iya tsallake shi kuma ku kunna shi daga baya a Saituna.
Don sanya lambobinku zama da sabon bayani lokacin da app ɗin yake a rufe, da fatan za a zaɓi \'A kowane lokaci\' a allon na gaba.
Ana buƙatar wurin bango don sabunta lambobinku lokacin da app ɗin yake a rufe. Da fatan za a sake gwadawa kuma zaɓi \'A kowane lokaci\'.
Android tana iya dakatar da LocaPeer don adana baturi. Don tabbatar da ingantaccen sabuntawa, da fatan za a cire LocaPeer daga ingantawa.
Cibiyar sadarwar wurin ku na sirri tana shirye.
Ana buƙatar izinin kamara don duba lambobin QR.
Wannan zai haɗa ku da %1$s kuma ku fara raba wurinku ga juna.
An aika wa %1$s buƙata. Za a haɗa ku da zaran sun amince.
Bada wani damar duba wannan don bin wurin ku
Za a rufa wurin ku ne musamman don na\'urar mai dubawa.
Ba da izinin kamara don duba lambar QR.
Za a haɗa ku da %1$s da zaran sun amince.
Ƙara su cikin lambobinku sannan a raba wurin zama?
%1$s yana son sabunta yadda kuke rabawa. Duba saitunan da ke ƙasa.
%1$s ya ƙara ku a matsayin lamba! Yanzu zaku iya zaɓar abin da zaku raba da shi.
Za su iya ganin inda kake
Ba kwa raba wurin ku da %1$s
Ba kwa samun damar shiga wurin %1$s
Dakatar da aika wurin ku zuwa ga %1$s na ɗan lokaci
Karɓi gargaɗin gaggawa koda an dakatar da rabawa
Sanar da ni idan %1$s ya daina bayar da rahoton wurinsa
Sanar da ni lokacin da %1$s yake kusa
Saita wuraren isowa da tashi don %1$s
Kuna karɓa da amincewa da buƙatun buɗewa daga %1$s
Bada izinin %1$s ya aiko muku da buƙatun buɗewa a yanayin sa ido
Duba tarihin motsi da rahoton taswira na %1$s
Tsayon lokacin da %1$s zai riƙe tarihin wurinku
Tsayon lokacin da %1$s zai riƙe saƙonnin da kuka aika
Yana cire hira daga na\'urarku kawai.
Yana share hira a cikin na\'ura da kuma daga lambarku.
Yana share hira a cikin na\'ura kuma yana aika buƙatar sharewa zuwa na\'urar lamba don hira.
Saka A Matsayin Wanda Aka Karanta
Ajiye hira don kiyaye akwatin saƙonku ya zama da tsabta
Buɗe taswira kuma danna mutum\ndon fara hira
Kedu yadda kuke son share wannan hira da %1$s?
Babu lambobi tukuna. Duba lambar QR don ƙara lamba.
Kun toshe saƙonni daga %1$s. Jeka Lambobi don buɗewa.
Kedu yadda kuke son share wannan saƙon?
Yana share hira daga na\'urar lamba.
Yana cire hira a cikin na\'ura kuma yana share ta kai tsaye daga na\'urar lamba.
Wannan zai yada wurin ku kowane bayan daƙiƙa 15 ga lambobinku na SOS da aka zaɓa har sai an kashe shi.
Wannan zai dakatar da yada wurin zama mai mahimmanci ga lambobinku na gaggawa.
Babu abokan da ake bibiya tukuna
Ya wuce lokaci - babu sabon bayani
Lokaci na ƙarshe da aka gani
Jaribu họrọ ụbọchị ọzọ ma ọ bụ lelee njikọ gị.
Babu wuraren da aka kurekodi na wannan ranar ko lokacin.
Danna + don ƙirƙirar wurin geofence, sannan ka sanya lambobi a kai daga saitunansu na rabawa.

plurals.name: geo_delete_assigned
plurals.item: An sanya \"%1$s\" ga lamba %2$d. Share shi yana cire waɗancan sanya ɗin ma.
An sanya \"%1$s\" ga lambobi %2$d. Share shi yana cire waɗancan sanya ɗin ma.

resources.string: Danna + don sanya wurin geofence kuma zaɓi ko za a ba da gargaɗi lokacin isowa, lokacin tashi, ko duka biyun.
Buru ụzọ mepụta mpaghara geofence site na ihuenyo Geofences, wee kenye ya ebe a.
Danna ko ka riƙe taswira don sanyawa
Pinch láti mú u dunjú • Jide ko ka ja pin don matsar da shi
Ba a sami adireshin da ya dace ba
Gargaɗi na aiki a kowane lokaci. Ƙara doka don taƙaita lokacin da ake aika gargaɗi.
Duba QR na gayyatar wani daga shafin duba\ndon fara bibiyar wurinsa
Sami sanarwa lokacin da mutumin da ake bibiya ya zo tsakanin nisan da kuka zaɓa.
Yi gargaɗi lokacin nesa a cikin %1$s
Ana raba wuri a kowane lokaci. Ƙara doka don taƙaita lokacin da rabawa yake aiki.
Ana raba wuri tare da %1$s a kowane lokaci. Ƙara doka don taƙaita lokacin.
Yana aiki lokacin da kowace doka ta dace da lokacin yanzu. wofi = a kowane lokaci.
Dukkan dare: na aiki daga %1$s zuwa %2$s rana ta gaba
Amincewar mai sa ido ana buƙata don shiga saituna.
Ana jiran amincewar mai sa ido…
Mai sa ido ya ƙi samun dama.
Lokacin buƙata ya ƙare. Mai sa ido bai amsa ba.
Zaɓi waɗanne alamun shafukan da za su bayyana a kasan da kuma tsarin su. Taswira tana nan a kowane lokaci.
Raba wurin zama na sirri tare da mutanen da kuka amince da su. Babu asusu, babu girgije, babu sa ido daga gare mu.
Bayanin taswira © masu ba da gudummawa ga OpenStreetMap
%1$s yana son ya zama mai sa idon ku
Amince don ba da damar buƙatun amincewar buɗewa daga wannan na\'urar
Amince don ba da damar %1$s ya aiko muku da buƙatun amincewar buɗewa lokacin da yanayin sa ido yake aiki.
Mai sa idon ku ya tabbatar - yanayin sa ido ya riga ya riga ya riga ya tashi
Mai sa idon ku ya ƙi buƙatar - an kashe yanayin sa ido
%1$s ya sami gargaɗin kusanci gamshe ku
%1$s ya sami gargaɗin cewa kun shiga/fita fence: %2$s
%1$s yana sa ido kan wurin ku
%1$s yana son sabunta yadda kuke raba wurare.
%1$s ya ƙara ku a matsayin lamba kuma yana son ya haɗa.
%1$s yanzu an haɗa shi da ku.
%1$s ya ƙi buƙatar rabon wurin ku.
Ń rán ìkìlọ̀ pàjáwìrì sí àwọn ojúlùmọ̀ SOS
Kun fara sa ido kan na\'urar %1$s yanzu
Òkù kò dára: kókó ọha kò dára
Òkù kò dára: kókó kò dọ́gba
Babu abin da za a mayar
Maɓalli ba daidai ba - dole ne ya zama haruffa 64 hex.
Kulle-app yana buƙatar mai masaukin da ke goyon bayan tambayar tsarin. Sabunta app.
Yi amfani da biometric ko PIN na na\'ura
Tabbatar don ganin wuraren ka da saƙonni.
An kai wa na\'urar mai karɓa
Ya kasa - saƙo ya makale a layi
Share \"%1$s\" da tattaunawar rukuninsa? Wannan yana cirewa daga na\'urarka kawai.
Ƙirƙiri da\'ira don aika saƙo ga rukunin lambobin sadarwa da raba wurin ka da kowa lokaci ɗaya.
Fara ƙara lambobin sadarwa, sannan ka haɗa su cikin da\'ira.
Na ajiye maɓallin sirri na a wuri mai aminci

Shaidar ka maɓallin sirri ne da ake ajiye a wannan na\'ura kawai. Babu asusu kuma babu sake saita kalmar sirri - idan ka rasa wannan wayar ba tare da ajiyayye ba, shaidar ka da lambobin sadarwa za su ɓace har abada.
Kana iya fitar da ajiyayyen da aka ɓoye a kowane lokaci a cikin Saituna → Ajiya da Maɓallai.
Duk wanda ke da wannan maɓalli zai iya ɗaukar kamanninka ya karanta saƙonninka. Ajiye shi a wuri na sirri - a mai sarrafa kalmar sirri, ba a hoton allo ba.
Har gobe da ƙarfe 8 na safe
Raba na ɗan lokaci, sannan ya tsaya kai tsaye.
Buƙaci biometric ko PIN don buɗe LocaPeer
Nan take idan ka bar app
Yi amfani da launuka daga bangon ka (Android 12+)
Fayil ya yi girma sosai (matsakaici 100 KB)
Babu manhaja da za ta iya buɗe wannan fayil
Mai da\'irar kaɗai ne zai iya sauya mata suna ko canza mambobinta.
Ka bar \"%1$s\"? Za a sanar da mai shi kuma ya cire ka daga da\'irar.
Bar da share a wannan na\'ura
Yana cire da\'irar da saƙonninta daga wannan na\'ura. Saƙonnin da ka aika sun kasance a na\'urorin sauran mambobi.
Har ila yau yana share saƙonnin da ka aika daga na\'urorin sauran mambobi.
Yi Alama a matsayin Wanda ba a Karanta ba
Speed up your updates when a contact is viewing the map.
Ask contacts for faster updates when you have the map open.
Choose which relays carry your data

LocaPeer sends your data through Nostr relays. Content is always end-to-end encrypted, but public relays can still see which contacts you talk to and when. Use your own relays to reduce that exposure.
Enter a valid wss:// relay address.
That relay is already in the list.

While supervised mode is on, changing settings, removing your supervisor, or turning this off all need your supervisor\'s approval. If they become unreachable, you may be locked out until they respond.
You can\'t remove your supervisor while supervised mode is on. Turn off supervised mode first.
Supervised mode is on, so location sharing with your supervisor can\'t be turned off here.
No screen lock is set on this device, so there\'s nothing to unlock with. Set a PIN, pattern, password, or biometric in your device settings, then reopen LocaPeer.
Set a password to include your private key. An unencrypted key file could let anyone take over your identity.
